defaults.name: Math & Science
defaults.description: MathJax-ready template for equations, proofs, and scientific notation

noteType.name: Math & Science

tmpls.name: Card 1
tmpls.afmt:
{{Problem}}
{{Solution}}
{{#Steps}}
Derivation
{{Steps}}
{{/Steps}} {{#Context}}
{{Context}}
{{/Context}}

previewData.Steps:
Square the integral and convert to polar coordinates:
I² = ∫∫ e^(−(x²+y²)) dx dy → polar → π/4
Therefore I = √π / 2
previewData.Context: Gaussian integral — probability, thermodynamics, quantum mechanics
